name: 4-methylumbelliferyl… to CTP
summary: A 13-step route from 4-methylumbelliferyl acetate to CTP(4−), ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: acetate--CoA ligase
reactions.equation: acetate + ATP + CoA = acetyl-CoA + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: glycerone kinase
reactions.equation: dihydroxyacetone + ATP = dihydroxyacetone phosphate + ADP + H(+)

reactions.name: glycerone-phosphate O-acyltransferase
reactions.equation: dihydroxyacetone phosphate + an acyl-CoA = a 1-acylglycerone 3-phosphate + CoA

reactions.name: phosphatidate cytidylyltransferase
reactions.equation: a 1,2-diacyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate + CTP + H(+) = a CDP-1,2-diacyl-sn-glycerol + diphosphate

reactions.name: CDP-diacylglycerol--inositol 3-phosphatidyltransferase
reactions.equation: a CDP-1,2-diacyl-sn-glycerol + myo-inositol = a 1,2-diacyl-sn-glycero-3-phospho-(1D-myo-inositol) + CMP + H(+)

reactions.name: glycine--tRNA ligase
reactions.equation: tRNA(Gly) + glycine + ATP = glycyl-tRNA(Gly) + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: serinol + NADP(+) + H2O = dihydroxyacetone + NH4(+) + NADPH + H(+)
reactions.equation: serinol + NADP(+) + H2O = dihydroxyacetone + NH4(+) + NADPH + H(+)

reactions.name: glycerol-3-phosphate dehydrogenase [NAD(P)(+)]
reactions.equation: sn-glycerol 3-phosphate + NADP(+) = dihydroxyacetone phosphate + NADPH + H(+)

reactions.name: sn-glycerol-1-phosphate dehydrogenase
reactions.equation: sn-glycerol 1-phosphate + NAD(+) = dihydroxyacetone phosphate + NADH + H(+)

reactions.name: a 1-acylglycerone 3-phosphate + hexadecan-1-ol = 1-O-hexadecylglycerone 3-phosphate + a...
reactions.equation: a 1-acylglycerone 3-phosphate + hexadecan-1-ol = 1-O-hexadecylglycerone 3-phosphate + a fatty acid + H(+)

reactions.name: acyl phosphate:glycerol-3-phosphate acyltransferase
reactions.equation: an acyl phosphate + sn-glycerol 3-phosphate = a 1-acyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate + phosphate

reactions.name: N-acetylphosphatidylethanolamine-hydrolyzing phospholipase D
reactions.equation: an N-acyl-1,2-diacyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphoethanolamine + H2O = an N-acylethanolamine + a 1,2-diacyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate + H(+)

reactions.name: CDP-diacylglycerol--serine O-phosphatidyltransferase
reactions.equation: a CDP-1,2-diacyl-sn-glycerol + L-serine = a 1,2-diacyl-sn-glycero-3-phospho-L-serine + CMP + H(+)

reactions.name: cardiolipin synthase (CMP-forming)
reactions.equation: a CDP-1,2-diacyl-sn-glycerol + a 1,2-diacyl-sn-glycero-3-phospho-(1'-sn-glycerol) = a cardiolipin + CMP + H(+)
